title: TaskTriageResult
description: Output of the triage classifier (GitHub Actions keyword-based job or lightweight LLM call). Determines which pipeline path and model tier to use.

level.description: Task complexity: 1=lightweight (typo/rename/format), 2=standard (new component/bugfix), 3=architectural (schema migration/auth rewrite/mass refactor).

rationale.description: One sentence explaining why this level was assigned.

recommended_model.description: Model tier: lightweight for explore/verify at any level and all phases at level 1; advanced for plan/implement at level 3.

requires_human_gate.description: true for level 3 tasks — a human must add the '{{COPILOT_LABEL}}-approved' label before the pipeline proceeds.

estimated_files_touched.description: Rough estimate of how many source files will be modified.

skip_phases.description: For level 1 tasks, phases that may be skipped to reduce cost (e.g., skip explore if file is named in the issue).

risk_factors.description: Specific keywords or patterns that raised the risk level.
